summary: Iteration 26 - Admin Panel Catalogue Tree View Testing Complete. ALL TESTS PASSED. The new audios_new.html template renders a hierarchical collapsible tree view showing Cursus → Cours → Épisodes with stats, expand/collapse, edit modal, and sync functionality.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Catalogue Tree View at /api/admin-panel/audios fully tested. All features working: tree rendering, expand/collapse, edit modal, sync preview, stats display.

admin_login.details: Admin login with loubna.serrar@gmail.com works correctly

catalogue_page_loads.details: Catalogue page loads with title 'Catalogue' and description 'Vue arborescente Cursus → Cours → Épisodes'

stats_display.details: Stats show: 5 Cursus, 24 Cours, 77 Episodes, 77 Synchronisés

tree_view_cursus_nodes.details: 5 cursus nodes rendered with letters A-E, correct names and episode counts
cursus_list: [A] La Falsafa et son héritage - 7 cours · 25 épisode(s)
[C] Sciences islamiques et transmission - 5 cours · 12 épisode(s)
[D] Arts, Littérature et Sciences - 6 cours · 12 épisode(s)
[E] Philosophies et spiritualités en dialogue - 4 cours · 22 épisode(s)

expand_collapse_cursus.details: Clicking cursus header expands/collapses to show courses with chevron animation

expand_collapse_course.details: Clicking course header shows episode rows with EP number, Title, Professor, Duration, Sync status, action buttons

episode_row_content.details: Episode rows display: EP number, Title, Professeur (scholar_name), Durée, Sync status (green dot), Edit/Delete buttons

edit_modal.details: Edit button opens modal with fields: Titre, Description, Professeur (dropdown), Durée (sec), Fichier R2 (readonly). Modal has Annuler and Enregistrer buttons.

delete_button.details: Delete button present on each episode row with danger styling

sync_preview_button.details: data-testid='preview-sync-btn' button calls POST /api/admin/sync-preview and shows modal with create/update/delete counts

sync_all_button.details: data-testid='sync-all-btn' button present for triggering POST /api/admin/sync-all-r2

dashboard_regression.details: Dashboard page still works with stats: 6 Professeurs, 24 Cours, 77 Audios, 28 Utilisateurs

sidebar_navigation.details: Catalogue link highlighted when on audios page, navigation between pages works

admin_cursus.result: Returns 5 cursus with id, name, is_active, course_count

admin_audios.result: Returns 77 audio episodes with file_key, course_id, stream_url

template_structure.audios_new.html: Extends base.html, uses extra_styles block for tree CSS, page_init block calls loadCatalogue(), scripts block contains tree rendering logic
template_structure.base.html: Has extra_styles block in head, sidebar with Catalogue link, main-content area
